# Greg Maxfield

> Author of literary fiction rooted in the American West. Creator of The Lund Covenant (debut novel, July 2026), Operation Granny Files (genealogy education), and The Unfolding Plot (serialized fiction on Substack). Published by Silver Sage Media.

Greg Maxfield is an author based in the Pacific Northwest. A native of Emery County, Utah, he spent three decades in the energy industry before turning full-time to writing. His work explores the intersections of family obligation, cultural memory, and moral reckoning in places where history is still present in the land and people.

## Books & Fiction

- [The Lund Covenant](https://www.gregmaxfield.com/the-lund-covenant) — Debut literary novel. A photojournalist returns to Castle Dale, Utah after his father's death and uncovers a hidden network of desert humanitarian aid that someone has methodically destroyed. A novel about moral inheritance, complicity, and bearing witness. ~82,000 words. Paperback & Ebook. July 2026. For readers of Kent Haruf, Marilynne Robinson, and Denis Johnson.
- [The Unfolding Plot (Substack)](https://theunfoldingplot.substack.com) — The Lund Covenant serialized chapter by chapter on Substack.

## About

- [About Greg Maxfield](https://www.gregmaxfield.com/about) — Author biography. Native of Emery County, Utah. Three decades in the energy industry before writing full-time. Lives in the Pacific Northwest. Studied history and geography of the American Southwest; volunteered with Native American elders.
- [Greg Maxfield — Home](https://www.gregmaxfield.com/) — Author homepage with book details, projects, and newsletter signup.

## Blog

- [The Story Behind The Lund Covenant](https://www.gregmaxfield.com/blog/the-story-behind-the-lund-covenant) — How a small Utah town, a family secret, and the desert landscape shaped a novel about complicity, memory, and moral inheritance. Published 2026-03-29.
- [Blog](https://www.gregmaxfield.com/blog) — Writing updates, craft notes, and behind-the-scenes coverage of The Lund Covenant.

## Optional

- [Operation Granny Files (Substack)](https://operationgrannyfiles.substack.com) — A family history project that turns genealogy into story — real ancestors, real documents, real narrative. Over 2,000 readers.
- [Sneak Peek](https://www.gregmaxfield.com/sneak-peek) — Early access content for The Lund Covenant.
- [Conduital](https://conduital.com) — Personal productivity system Greg built for connecting notes, projects, and actions.
